name: Appendix B2 — Reliability Drill (retry + Stop And Error)

parameters.content:
📖 [Course documentation](https://ezponda.github.io/ai-agents-course/appendix_b2_production_reliability.html)
## Reliability drill — Retry, Timeout, and a REAL hard stop
**Goal:** Watch the reliability settings actually fire. The URL is set to `https://httpbin.org/status/503` so the call **fails**: the node **retries** with a delay, times out on hangs, routes to the **error output**, and the **Stop And Error** node makes the whole execution **fail** (a true fail-closed — not a workflow that finishes 'green' with a failure message).

### Where the settings live
Open **Call an API → Settings**: *Retry On Fail*, *Max Tries*, *Wait Between Tries*, *On Error* → *Continue (error output)*. *Timeout* is in **Options**.

### See the success path too
Change the URL to `https://httpbin.org/get` and re-run — now the top branch runs and nothing errors.

⚠️ Retries suit **transient** errors (429/500/503/timeout). Do **not** auto-retry validation/permission errors.

assignments.name: result
assignments.value: All retries failed. Stopping — do not record success or send anything.

parameters.errorMessage: API unavailable after retries — failing closed (nothing was recorded).
